parameters.query:
INSERT INTO geo_stats (ad_id, country_code, date, shows, clicks, money, postbacks_confirmed_money, roi)
SELECT 
  {{ $json.ad_id }},
  d->>'country',
  CURRENT_DATE,
  (d->>'clicks')::int,
  (d->>'clicks')::int,
  (d->>'spend')::decimal,
  0,
  (d->>'roi')::decimal
FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($json.details) }}'::jsonb) AS d;
